plan.goal: Add a coder reference agent that applies implementation plans.
plan.summary: Implement a CLI-first coder wrapper that consumes implementation.plan and delegates code edits to an external coding CLI.
implementationSteps: Inspect existing agents and copy the CLI-first envelope/event/artifact pattern.
Add agents/coder with task type code.change.
Read implementation.plan from input or prior artifacts.
Run the configured external coding CLI in the target workspace.
Emit code.change.result with changed files and command output summary.
acceptanceCriteria: coder validates TaskEnvelope input and unsupported task types.
coder wraps an external coding CLI instead of implementing its own model loop.
coder emits valid protocol events and a code.change.result artifact on success.
risks: The external coding CLI may not be installed in the local environment.

handoff.instructions: Apply the plan in the target workspace. Do not commit, push, or open a PR.
